primerTitle: Quant & trader interview — how to use it
primer:
## Quant & trader interview
The harder, desk-flavoured problem set: probability & Bayes, expected value / waiting times, market-making & EV decisions, combinatorial games, and math-olympiad puzzles (invariants, weighing/information, cryptarithms, spatial counting). **One deck per family**, each led by a method primer — learn the technique, then apply it. Great in exam mode.
